ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dating_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dating site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the dating site */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the dating site */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the site is currently active and being reviewed */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the site is primarily based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the site was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the site */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* The primary target audience (e.g., singles, professionals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the editor's review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the editor (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the editor who wrote the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "pros" TEXT /* List of positive points about the site */,
  "cons" TEXT /* List of negative points about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_reviews_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_reviews_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the site supports the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., communication, security) */,
  "feature_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_features_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the engagement metric (e.g., Average Time Spent, Interactions) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "user_segment" TEXT /* Segment of users (e.g., new users, returning users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_data" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members */,
  "price_plan" TEXT /* Name of the price plan (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "price_amount" REAL /* Price amount for the plan */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price amount */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the membership data is publicly available */,
  "plan_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the membership plan (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Description of the benefits included in the plan */,
  "signup_bonus" TEXT /* Any signup bonus or discount offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the site */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., user experience, features, price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, reviewer, regular user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dating site */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., screenshot, logo) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES dating_sites ("site_id")
)
